parameters.jsonBody: ={ "model": "llava", "prompt": "Describe this drawing in detail for a children story. What characters or objects are shown? What are they doing? Be specific. " + ( $("Webhook").item.json.language === "id" ? " Write in Indonesian." : $("Webhook").item.json.language === "zh-TW" ? " Write in Traditional Chinese." : " Write in English." ), "images": ["" + $("Webhook").item.json.image + ""], "stream": false }

={ "model": "llama3.2", "prompt": "Write a magical 30-second children story (under 100 words, ages 4-8) based on this description: \"" + $node["Ollama Vision"].json.response + "\".
